content:
# Micro Xct

**Summary**: A non-destructive 3D imaging technique used to visualize internal pore structures and dissolution patterns in rock samples.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014]] used Micro XCT to characterize the 3D image of the disks before conducting the reaction kinetics experiment.

## Instruments and Software



## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Micro XCT images showed that at 1250 rpm, the entire surface of the 13% porosity disk was reacted significantly by the acid. ([[2014-khalid|Khalid, 2014, p. 145]])
